cassette: none: cypher.ObservabilityCoverageEdgeWriter operates over flat map[string]any rows, not a CanonicalMaterialization; the two fixture rows live inline in go/internal/replay/costcounting/observability_coverage_edge_cost_test.go
description: Two distinct (observability_uid, target_uid) COVERS edge rows sharing the same coverage_signal (alarm) in one scope, driven through the production unwrapped writer (cypher.ObservabilityCoverageEdgeWriter, no owner-ledger gate) over an InstrumentedExecutor. The writer groups rows by coverage_signal into one Cypher statement per signal; both rows share a signal and fit the default batch size (500), so the writer emits exactly one UNWIND write statement (eshu_dp_neo4j_batches_executed_total=1, statements_executed=1). Any increase — an N+1 write cycle or an extra signal-group/batch split — trips the gate.
refresh_path: manual: edit the inline fixture rows in observability_coverage_edge_cost_test.go and this file together, reviewed in the same diff (no credentialed cassette refresh applies since there is no cassette)
